title: Valve updates on Steam Machines, hardware prices, sales, and the development of Mann vs Machine mode
summary: Valve confirms it won't release exclusives for Steam Machine, reports weekly sales of thousands of units, warns about memory price increases, and assures progress on the Team Fortress 2 update.

title: Call of Duty movie to premiere in 2028 and will be set in the Modern Warfare universe
summary: The film adaptation of the Call of Duty video game franchise is scheduled for release in 2028 and will be based on the Modern Warfare series.

title: Xbox sparks controversy with statements about Game Pass, exclusives, and layoffs
summary: Xbox executives and employees express differing opinions on Game Pass and the direction of exclusives, while a strategy of more permanent exclusives is confirmed.

title: Magic: The Gathering announces collaborations with Stardew Valley and The Hobbit, and reveals 2027 sets
summary: Wizards of the Coast has revealed themed cards from Stardew Valley and The Hobbit, in addition to previewing the expansion roadmap for 2027.

title: Bethesda confirms Fallout 5, classic remasters, and new content for Starfield
summary: The company announces the development of Fallout 5, remasters of classic titles, and updates for Starfield, while rumors about Fallout: New Vegas 2 grow.

title: Nintendo Switch 2: Lies of P previews, dock patent, Zelda rumors, and Gecko Gods review
summary: Nintendo's next console continues to generate news: previews of Lies of P, a patent for the dock, speculation about a Zelda remake, and the review of Gecko Gods.

title: IO Interactive reveals that its James Bond 007 First Light game was going to be a ensemble project with multiple agents
summary: The studio details that the cancelled title would have featured multiple 00 agents working together, moving away from the exclusive focus on James Bond.

title: The video game Wuthering Waves will have an anime series titled 'Wuthering Waves: Elysium'
summary: Developer Kuro Games has announced the production of an animated series based on the successful action role-playing game.

title: Disco Elysium studio ZA/UM suffers more layoffs after the launch of its new game
summary: The developer has laid off up to 32 employees amid restructuring following the release of Zero Parades: For Dead Spies.

title: Sony confirms regional pricing for Latin America and the July PS Plus games
summary: PlayStation Store sets differentiated rates for the Latin American region, while the nine titles coming to PS Plus in July are revealed.

title: Christopher Nolan to release 'The Odyssey' while another adaptation of the myth starring Ralph Fiennes arrives on streaming
summary: Nolan's new film about the Odyssey already has a streaming release date and generates analysis, while a classic version starring Ralph Fiennes is available on platforms.

title: A highly anticipated Final Fantasy game is cancelled while Final Fantasy X celebrates its 25th anniversary with a trailer
summary: A highly anticipated entry in the Final Fantasy saga has been cancelled before its official announcement, and Square Enix releases a commemorative trailer for the 25th anniversary of Final Fantasy X.

title: Amazon's God of War series will replace the actor playing Kratos after an on-set injury
summary: The production of the television adaptation of the God of War video game has decided to replace the actor portraying Kratos due to an injury suffered during filming.

title: Marathon director Joe Ziegler leaves Bungie one month after mass layoffs
summary: Joe Ziegler, director of the game Marathon, leaves the studio following recent waves of layoffs at Bungie.

title: The live-action adaptation of Naruto reveals new production details
summary: The live-action film project based on the popular manga Naruto shares progress on its production, although with potential creative risks.

title: Exclusive Pokémon Go Mewtwo obtained in a raid is auctioned for up to $10,000
summary: A player has put up for sale a Mewtwo captured in an exclusive Pokémon Go raid in Times Square, reaching auction prices of thousands of dollars.

title: GameStop acquires nearly 10% of eBay in a hostile takeover plan that baffles analysts
summary: The video game retail chain GameStop has accumulated a significant stake in eBay, in a hostile takeover move that has surprised the market.

title: Gears of War creator Cliff Bleszinski plans to return to video game development avoiding PvP
summary: Cliff Bleszinski, creator of the Gears of War series, is considering returning to the video game industry, but rules out creating competitive multiplayer games after the failure of his latest project.

title: Actress Jennifer English leaves a new fantasy game due to health issues
summary: Jennifer English, known for her role in Baldur's Gate 3 and Clair Obscur, has resigned from an upcoming video game project for health reasons, according to a recent update.

title: A country attempts to legally ban people from falling in love with AI chatbots
summary: A nation has proposed legislation to penalize citizens falling in love with conversational artificial intelligences, generating global debate.
